hero.heading: Real Mechanics, No runaround.
hero.subtext: Corney's Automotive Services is a local family business — not a franchise, not a chain. The person you talk to is the person who works on your car. That's how it's always been, and that's how it'll stay.

story.heading: Taree's Trusted Mechanic
paragraphs: Corney's has been part of the Taree community for years — and we've built our reputation one car at a time. We work on all makes and models, from the family hatchback to the trade ute. No middlemen. No mystery. Just experienced, hands-on service from people who take genuine pride in what they do.

The Corney's difference
We know the frustration of mechanics who charge for work that wasn't needed, hand your car back with the same problem, or simply never call when they say they will. That's not who we are.

- We tell you what's wrong and give you a price before we start.

- We call you if anything changes — no surprises at pickup.

- We hand your keys back when we say we will, with a straight explanation of what was done and why.

Proudly local
Our customers are Taree families, tradespeople, and local businesses — people who've trusted us with their vehicles and keep coming back. That trust is something we work hard to earn every single day, and it's the foundation everything we do is built on.

items.title: Honest Communication
items.desc: We call before we do anything unexpected. You know what's happening to your car at every step.

items.title: Fair Pricing
items.desc: Competitive rates, no hidden charges, and we'll always give you a quote before starting work.

items.title: Done Right, On Time
items.desc: Quality work, done properly, ready when we say it'll be ready. That's the standard we hold ourselves to.
